packs.name: Clean Tech Explainer
packs.blurb: Bright, minimal sans-serif explainer: white canvas, faint grid, soft-shadow cards, single blue accent. Reuses the shared motion mechanism.

packs.name: Dark Truth Behind the Social Media
packs.blurb: Warm-paper grunge editorial: spray-paint hero type, 1-bit halftone cutouts, live grain, news-conveyor ticker, VO-locked choreography.
